# Project Access Austria

> Project Access Austria is the Austrian chapter of the international Project Access network. We support students from Austria and South Tyrol with free one-to-one mentoring, an annual application bootcamp, school visits and webinars to help them apply to selective international universities.

Project Access Austria (legal name: Projekt Hochschulzugang) is the Austrian chapter of the international Project Access network. We help students from Austria and South Tyrol apply to selective international universities such as Oxford, Cambridge, Harvard, ETH Zürich and Sciences Po. All support is free.

## Core pages

- [Home (Deutsch)](https://projectaccess.at/): mission, programme overview, bootcamp summary, team, contact.
- [Home (English)](https://projectaccess.at/en/): mission, programme overview, bootcamp summary, team, contact.
- [Bootcamp 2026 (Deutsch)](https://projectaccess.at/bootcamp.html): dates (23–26 July 2026, Horn, Lower Austria), agenda, eligibility, FAQs.
- [Bootcamp 2026 (English)](https://projectaccess.at/en/bootcamp.html): dates, agenda, eligibility, FAQs.
- [Team & join us (Deutsch)](https://projectaccess.at/team.html): team list and ways to volunteer or mentor.
- [Team & join us (English)](https://projectaccess.at/en/team.html): team list and ways to volunteer or mentor.
- [Partners (Deutsch)](https://projectaccess.at/partners.html): supporters, school partnerships, sponsorship.
- [Partners (English)](https://projectaccess.at/en/partners.html): supporters, school partnerships, sponsorship.
- [Events (Deutsch)](https://projectaccess.at/events.html): upcoming and recent events.
- [Events (English)](https://projectaccess.at/en/events.html): upcoming and recent events.

## Optional

- [Project Access International](https://projectaccess.org): the wider network we are part of.
- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/projectaccess.at/): announcements and news.
- Contact: austria@projectaccess.org
